name: ai-call
description: AI Agent 外呼机器人 - FreeSWITCH + WebSocket 直连 + NestJS + Next.js

scripts.check: pnpm --filter @ai-call/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-call/api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @ai-call/api test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-call/api test && pnpm --filter @ai-call/dashboard test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-call/dashboard test:unit && pnpm test:python:voice && pnpm test:python:funasr
scripts.test:api: pnpm --filter @ai-call/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-call/api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @ai-call/api test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-call/api test
scripts.test:all: pnpm test && pnpm test:python:voice && pnpm test:python:funasr
scripts.dev:funasr:setup: cd services/funasr-server && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install ./vendor/editdistance-pure/ && .venv\Scripts\pip install -e ".[dev]"
